title: Structure of a 4-to-1 Multiplexer
description: A visual breakdown of a 4-to-1 multiplexer, showing its inputs, select lines, and output, with a focus on how it can be modeled in HDL.
relationships: S1 and S0 values select which data input (D0-D3) is connected to the output Y
Each AND gate is enabled by a unique combination of select lines and their complements
The outputs of all AND gates feed into a single OR gate to produce the final output Y
